designAuthority.scope: Runtime-neutral DESIGN-authority for Ontology construction + Ontology-First operation; SCAN (README->BROWSE->INDEX->slice) and selectively inject before such work. NOT a source/workflow authority and NOT a runtime dependency; the 'authority' field above remains the canonical plugin-source.

runtimeBoundaryAuthorityScope: Runtime-neutral boundary contract only; canonical plugin workflow source remains the runtime-neutral local checkout backed by the private marketplace remote.

consumerRuntimes.consumesVia: Codex marketplace registration for ~/palantir-mini-marketplace during local development or palantir-mini@palantir-mini-marketplace after merge; Codex protocol ownership stays under ~/.codex/**

forbiddenForks: Do NOT create workflow semantic forks in ~/.codex/plugins/palantir-mini/ or other runtime dirs.
Runtime-native protocol adapters, settings, memory stores, and reload docs belong in the owning runtime home.
Per-runtime adapters are protocol authorities for their native runtime, not palantir-mini workflow authorities.
